duration: seen very briefly heard three times
specific_location: 835 Harmony Drive, Pueblo West. My front yard.
description: I went to the window, and saw the small dove with a long tail fly out of the locust tree. I wouldn't have known it was there, if it hadn't been calling.Behaviors: Calling and then flew off across the street.Call: It called three times, "no-hope, no-hope, no-hope".Plumage: adult
